name: harness-forge
description: Hydrate a project to run looping, latticed agentic workflows. A kernel that scaffolds and operates a typed knowledge lattice — nine declarative layers × five scopes × a maturity state machine — driven by the engine (define→create→validate at the smallest signal-yielding scope, the signal minted from a real verifier command's exit status), the compass (scan→rank), and the regeneration loop (operate→ledger→distill→patterns). Runs a BOUNDED autonomous loop (/harness-run): a harness-builder orchestrator advances the frontier, with the caps (max-cells/iterations/wall-clock) and the no-progress stop ENFORCED IN CODE by a wired budget stop-gate — once a run is armed (the orchestrator's step 0), the loop cannot write past its budget. Ships an operating agent roster (a harness-builder orchestrator · harness-advancer · harness-auditor · harness-distiller) plus a 7-critic structural council (partial-order · verifier-integrity · reward-hacking · naming · budget · autonomy · staleness, fanned out in parallel isolated contexts by a harness-council orchestrator), stdlib gates that mechanize typed naming, the dependency partial-order, lattice structural validation, staleness propagation, the no-progress detector, and the global run budget, a consent-gated installer (wire.py) that wires the blocking protected-verifier gate, the budget stop-gate, and the audit-trail + staleness-cascade hooks into the project's own worker loop, an advisory session hook that flags naming/staleness on save (never blocks), a /harness-status operator dashboard, and a read-only lattice-query MCP over the project's .harness/ state. Self-contained.

harness_dir.title: Harness state directory
harness_dir.description: Path to the project's `.harness/` directory (the durable lattice state — lattice.json, the layer dirs, signals/, ledger/) that the read-only lattice-query MCP reads. Optional — leave unset to run the engine, compass, gates, and agent roster without live retrieval.
